title: bertolonia sanguinea var. santos-limae
intro: Bertolonia sanguinea var. santos-limae is a plant species belonging to the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "blood-stained Bertolonia" or "Bertolonia Santos-Lima". It is native to Brazil and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief from pain, and protection against infections. Bertolonia sanguinea var. santos-limae is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, where its leaves are steeped in hot water or mixed with other herbs to create remedies for various ailments.
